---
title: "A2Moritan"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{A2Moritan}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(A2Moritan)
```


#GitHub Repository
https://github.com/esemoritan-coder/A2Moritan
